title: VaultBackend put/get asymmetric when ?field= is absent
description: Trigger: caller uses VaultBackend without ?field= and calls put then get. put stores the value under field key 'value' in KV (producing {value: 'secret'}). get without ?field= returns the entire serialized data map ({"value":"secret"}) as bytes, not the raw bytes that were put. Round-trip put→get does not return the same bytes. Documented nowhere.
